name: ButtonGroup

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The buttons (or button-like elements, e.g. link-buttons or Toggle) to render as a single visually-joined group.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root role="group" element.

parameters.name: Orientation
parameters.description: Layout direction: Horizontal (default) joins children left-to-right with rounded end-caps; Vertical stacks them top-to-bottom.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the button group (exposes it to AT as a named role="group"). Roving tabindex is intentionally NOT forced here — a ButtonGroup commonly wraps independent actions that each need their own tab stop; use Toolbar for single-tab-stop/arrow-key navigation. (#270)

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root role="group" element.

examples.title: Horizontal (default)
examples.code:
<ButtonGroup>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
        <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Bold)" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
        <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Italic)" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
        <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Underline)" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
</ButtonGroup>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The buttons (or button-like elements, e.g. link-buttons or Toggle) to render as a single visually-joined group.

mdSummary:
# ButtonGroup

Button Group component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/button-group

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ButtonGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The buttons (or button-like elements, e.g. link-buttons or Toggle) to render as a single visually-joined group. |
| ButtonGroup | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root role="group" element. |
| ButtonGroup | Orientation | `Lumeo.Orientation` | `Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal` | Layout direction: Horizontal (default) joins children left-to-right with rounded end-caps; Vertical stacks them top-to-bottom. |
| ButtonGroup | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name for the button group (exposes it to AT as a named role="group"). Roving tabindex is intentionally NOT forced here — a ButtonGroup commonly wraps independent actions that each need their own tab stop; use Toolbar for single-tab-stop/arrow-key navigation. (#270) |
| ButtonGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root role="group" element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (ButtonGroup) — The buttons (or button-like elements, e.g. link-buttons or Toggle) to render as a single visually-joined group.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<ButtonGroup />
```

## CSS variables
`--radius`

## Files
